terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: Welcome to Flowstate ("Flowstate", "we", "us"). Flowstate is a web-based deep-work application providing a focus timer, original music, ambient sounds, and focus analytics, operated by Virzy Guns and available at flow.virzyguns.com. By accessing or using Flowstate you agree to these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please do not use the service.
terms.sec1_text: Flowstate offers a free tier and optional paid features. The core focus timer and a large library of music and ambient sounds are available at no cost. We may add, change, or remove features over time to improve the product.
terms.sec2_text: Some features require an account, created via Google sign-in or an email magic link. You are responsible for activity under your account and for keeping access to your email secure. You must be at least 13 years old (or the minimum digital-consent age in your country) to use Flowstate.
terms.sec3_text:
- Paid plans are available as a recurring monthly subscription for $9.99 per month or a recurring yearly subscription for $99.99 per year. Your chosen billing interval determines when your payment method is automatically charged.
- Payments are processed by Lemon Squeezy, Inc., which acts as our Merchant of Record. Lemon Squeezy handles billing, applicable taxes, and payment data. Their terms also apply to the purchase.
- Subscriptions renew automatically at the end of each billing period unless you cancel them. You can cancel your subscription at any time. If you cancel, your access to the paid features will continue until the end of your current billing period.
- We offer a 14-day refund window for both monthly and yearly plans. If you are unsatisfied, you may request a refund within 14 days of your initial purchase or any recurring charge. See our Refund and Cancellation Policy.
terms.sec4_text: The music and ambient audio in Flowstate are owned by or licensed to us. You receive a personal, non-exclusive, non-transferable license to stream this content for your own focus and productivity use while your account is in good standing. You may not download, redistribute, resell, sample, or use the audio in your own published works (including videos, streams, or commercial projects) without separate written permission.
terms.sec5_text:
You agree not to:
- Circumvent paid-feature gating, rate limits, or content protections.
- Scrape, mass-download, or rip the audio library or other assets.
- Attempt to disrupt, reverse-engineer, or gain unauthorized access to the service.
- Use Flowstate for any unlawful purpose.
terms.sec6_text: Flowstate, its name, logo, design, software, and content are our property or that of our licensors and are protected by intellectual-property laws. These Terms grant you no ownership rights.
terms.sec7_text: Flowstate is provided "as is" and "as available" without warranties of any kind. We do not guarantee uninterrupted or error-free operation, and we make no medical or productivity claims. Focus features are informational tools, not professional advice.
terms.sec8_text: To the maximum extent permitted by law, we are not liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of Flowstate. Our total liability for any claim is limited to the amount you paid us in the twelve months before the claim.
terms.sec9_text: We may suspend or terminate accounts that violate these Terms. You may stop using Flowstate at any time and delete your account by contacting us.
terms.sec10_text: We may update these Terms; material changes will be reflected by the "last updated" date above. Continued use after changes means you accept them. These Terms are governed by the laws of the Republic of Indonesia, without regard to conflict-of-law rules.

refund.title: Refund & Cancellation Policy
refund.intro: We want you to be happy with Flowstate. This policy explains how cancellations and refunds work for paid subscriptions.
refund.sec1_text: You can cancel your subscription at any time through your account settings or by contacting us. When you cancel, your plan stops renewing and you keep paid access until the end of the current billing period. We do not provide partial refunds for the unused portion of a period unless required by law.
refund.sec2_text:
- If you are not satisfied with your monthly ($9.99/mo) or yearly ($99.99/yr) subscription, you may request a refund within 14 days of your initial purchase or a renewal charge.
- Because much of Flowstate is free to try before you pay, refunds are granted at our reasonable discretion and may be declined in cases of evident abuse (for example, repeated refund-and-resubscribe cycles).
refund.sec3_text: Email founder@virzyguns.com from the address on your account, including your order or receipt details. Because Lemon Squeezy, Inc. is our Merchant of Record, approved refunds are issued through Lemon Squeezy back to your original payment method. You may also contact Lemon Squeezy support directly using the receipt they sent you.
refund.sec4_text: Approved refunds are typically processed within a few business days. The time for the funds to appear depends on your bank or card provider.
refund.sec5_text: If anything is unclear, reach out at founder@virzyguns.com. We are happy to help.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy explains what data Flowstate collects and how we use it. We aim to collect as little as possible. Flowstate is operated by Virzy Guns.
privacy.sec1_text:
- Account data: when you sign in, we store your email address and, if provided by Google sign-in, your name and avatar URL.
- Focus data: tasks, timer sessions, and focus analytics (such as session length, fidget counts, and focus ratio) that you generate while using the app, so we can sync them across your devices and show your history.
- Subscription data: your plan status and renewal dates. We do not store your card or payment details: those are handled entirely by our payment processor (see below).
- Technical data: standard server logs and security data (such as rate-limiting records) needed to operate the service securely.
privacy.sec2_text: We use your data to provide and sync the service, maintain your account and subscription, improve Flowstate, and keep the service secure. We do not sell your personal data, and we do not show third-party advertising.
privacy.sec3_text:
- Supabase: authentication and database hosting for your account and focus data.
- Lemon Squeezy, Inc.: our Merchant of Record, which processes payments and handles billing data and taxes. See Lemon Squeezy's privacy policy for details.
- Content delivery network: used to stream audio efficiently. CDN requests may include standard technical metadata such as IP address.
privacy.sec4_text: We use essential cookies and browser local storage to keep you signed in and to remember your in-app preferences (such as volume, scene, and timer settings). We do not use advertising or cross-site tracking cookies.
privacy.sec5_text: We keep your data for as long as your account is active. You can request a copy of your data or ask us to delete your account and associated data at any time by emailing us. Deleting your account removes your profile, tasks, and focus history.
privacy.sec6_text: We protect your data with industry-standard measures, including row-level security on our database, encrypted connections (HTTPS), and strict access controls. No system is perfectly secure, but we work to keep your information safe.
privacy.sec7_text: Flowstate is operated from Indonesia and uses service providers that may process data in other countries. By using Flowstate you consent to this transfer and processing.
privacy.sec8_text: We may update this policy; the "last updated" date above reflects the latest version. For questions or data requests, contact founder@virzyguns.com.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.intro: Flowstate ("Flowstate", "we", "us") uses cookies and browser local storage to deliver, secure, and improve our services. This Cookie Policy explains what these technologies are, how we use them, and your choices.
cookies.sec1_text: Cookies are small text files stored by your browser when you visit a website. Local storage is a similar web technology that allows us to store preferences and settings directly in your browser. Both allow us to remember your state and preferences across page loads and sessions.
cookies.sec2_text:
We only use essential cookies and local storage. We do not use third-party analytics, marketing, or advertising cookies.
- Authentication (Supabase): We use essential cookies to verify your identity and keep you securely signed in to your account. Without these cookies, you would have to sign in every time you navigate between pages.
- User Preferences (Local Storage): We use browser local storage to remember your customized preferences, such as your current ambient mixer volume levels, active scene background selection, and focus timer settings.
cookies.sec3_text: Because we process subscriptions and payments through Lemon Squeezy, Inc., they may place essential cookies at checkout to facilitate payment security and fraud prevention. Please consult Lemon Squeezy's privacy and cookie policies for details.
cookies.sec4_text: Most web browsers allow you to control cookies through their settings. You can block, disable, or delete cookies at any time. However, please note that blocking essential cookies will make it impossible to sign in or access your personalized focus data.
cookies.sec5_text: If you have any questions about our use of cookies or local storage, please contact us at founder@virzyguns.com.
